title: Final energy consumption in households by type of fuel (Eurostat)
description:
[Publisher: Eurostat]

Consumption of households (space heating, water heating, cooling, cooking, electrical appliances) and by type of fuel (according to the Standard International Energy product Classification - SIEC). Expressed in thousand tonnes of oil equivalent. Self-produced electricity is included in electricity consumption. Self-produced heat is counted only for active systems (such as solar thermal panels), while passive heating systems (such as south-oriented windows) are excluded.
